headline: Brightstar Capital Partners Invests in Bendon, a Provider of Screen-Free Children’s Activity Products
summary: NEW YORK & WEST PALM BEACH, Fla., April 22, 2026--Brightstar Capital Partners ("Brightstar"), a private equity firm focused on partnering with entrepreneurs and management teams, today announced its acquisition of Bendon Publishing International, Inc. ("Bendon" or "the Company"), a designer and distributor of licensed children’s coloring, activity, and educational products.
